en: I wouldn't want to waste your time
Yeah, I'll meet you in the car, on the corner
But we know it's gotta change sometime
ko: 하지만 언젠가는 바뀌어야 한다는 걸 알아

en: You know I love the taste of your water
ko: 네 물의 맛을 좋아하는 거 알잖아

en: But I think it's time to say goodbye
ko: 하지만 이제 작별할 때인 것 같아

en: Yeah, I'll meet you in the car, on the corner
But you're never gonna change my mind
ko: 하지만 넌 절대 내 마음을 바꾸지 못해

en: You know I wanna stay but you gotta
Leave because it don't feel right this time, alright
ko: 떠나야 해, 이번엔 느낌이 안 좋으니까, 알겠지

en: I'm slipping through the streets all night
Still bruising from your chalk skin bites
ko: 아직도 네 흔적에 멍이 들어 있어

en: Not sleeping at your place tonight
ko: 오늘 밤 네 집에서 안 잘 거야

en: I couldn't have you on my doorstep
ko: 문 앞에 너를 둘 수 없었어

en: I wouldn't want to waste your time
